basic_details.short_information: DLSA Balod Paralegal Volunteer Recruitment 2026 is now open for Paralegal Volunteer posts for candidates with 12th pass qualification, local residency of Balod district, and computer/mobile knowledge, with offline applications accepted until 05 June 2026 through the official website of DLSA Balod.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th Class passed, Local resident of Balod district, Knowledge of computer and mobile

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Balod Paralegal Volunteer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: DLSA Balod Paralegal Volunteer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
